zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farley於大約1527年出生在英國維爾爾海斯波利時，他的父親Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury26歲，母親Lady Susan Danvers24歲。他於1551年與Lady Susan Danvers在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1596年12月6日在英國薩默塞特法爾 格福德享年70歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特法爾 格福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farley于大约1527年出生在英国維爾爾海斯波利时，他的父亲Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury26岁，母亲Lady Susan Danvers24岁。他于1551年与Lady Susan Danvers在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1596年12月6日在英国薩默塞特法爾 格福德享年70岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特法爾 格福德。

nameMeanings.name: Hungerford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hungerford (Berkshire), from Old English hungor ‘hunger’, here probably denoting unproductive land, + ford. This surname has been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farley was born about 1527, in Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England, his father, Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury, was 26 and his mother, Lady Susan Danvers, was 24. He married Lady Susan Danvers in 1551, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 6 December 1596, in Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farley est né environ 1527, à Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Susan Danvers, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Lady Susan Danvers en 1551, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 6 décembre 1596, à Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farley um 1527 in Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury 26 und seine Mutter Lady Susan Danvers 24. Er hat 1551 in Devon, England Lady Susan Danvers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Dezember 1596 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England und wurde in Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farley è nato il circa 1527 nel Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Lady Susan Danvers, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Lady Susan Danvers nel 1551, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 6 dicembre 1596, nel Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farleyが約1527年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアヘイテスブリーで生まれた時，父Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesburyは26歳，母Lady Susan Danversは24歳であった。1551年にイギリスデボンでLady Susan Danversと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1596年12月6日にイギリスソメルセトファルレイグ ハンジャーフォードで70歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトファルレイグ ハンジャーフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farley(이)가 대략 1527년 영국 윌츠히르 헤이츠버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Susan Danvers(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1551년 영국 데폰에서 Lady Susan Danvers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1596년 12월 6일 영국 서머세트 패를리 헌그르퍼드에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 패를리 헌그르퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farley nasceu aproximadamente 1527, em Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Susan Danvers, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Susan Danvers em 1551, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de dezembro de 1596, em Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter Hungerford Knight of Farley родился около 1527 г. в местности хитсбури, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Hungerford 1st Baron Hungerford of Heytesbury было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Susan Danvers, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Susan Danvers в 1551 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 6 декабря 1596 г. в местности фарлиг хунгирфорд, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности фарлиг хунгирфорд, сомирсет, Англия.
